message:
gt dolt sync: park rigs during push to prevent witness interference

When gt dolt sync stops the Dolt server for pushing, witnesses would
detect the outage and restart the server mid-push, causing CPU spikes
(300%+) and push failures. Now parks all rigs before stopping the
server and unparks them after restart. Dry-run mode skips parking.

Fixes gt-o0216

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
